title: astragalus oligophyllus
intro: Astragalus oligophyllus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus oligophyllus include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus oligophyllus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
